title: Commerce.gov News Article
description: A news article published on the US Department of Commerce website via the Commerce.gov Content API

id.description: Unique identifier of the news article

body.description: Full HTML body content of the news article

summary.description: Short summary or teaser text for the article

created.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the article was created

changed.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the article was last modified

url.description: Relative URL path to the article on Commerce.gov

field_image.description: URL of the featured image for the article

tags.description: Topic tags associated with the article
